purpose: One pinned_local versus runpod_green LocalExtractionV1 comparison on identical frozen chunks; fixture gold is never read by inference.

synthetic_samples.text: Garden records published in winter 1911 were revised after the 2018 drought summer.
A reviewer should compare the baseline, but the intervention does not reduce the measured outcome unless the population changes.

synthetic_samples.repeat_text: Repeated observation may influence the measured baseline under the stated condition.
synthetic_samples.suffix: The final intervention reduces the outcome in winter 1911.

anti_gaming: No sample id, source text, or gold answer may branch inference.
The semantic gold fixture supplies text only; gold entities, relations, and claims are never loaded.
Thresholds, labels, normalization, comparison fields, and tolerance are immutable after the first inference.
Both engines receive byte-identical task JSON and frozen asset identities.
